title: 1.e4 — The King's Pawn
summary: An overview of every major 1.e4 reply

steps.title: The Romantic Opening
steps.text: 1.e4 opens lines for the queen and bishop and fights for the center with a pawn. It's sharp, tactical, and the most popular first move in chess history.

steps.title: Black's Main Replies
steps.text: Black has several serious answers: 1...e5 (classical, symmetrical), 1...c5 (Sicilian, asymmetric), 1...e6 (French), 1...c6 (Caro-Kann), 1...d5 (Scandinavian). Each leads to a distinct game.

steps.hint: 1...e5 mirrors White's claim on the center.
